title: James Bannantine
compiled_truth: James Bannantine is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-15 to 2001-05-23), James Bannantine sent 7 and received 125 emails, totalling 132 interactions. Top correspondents: [Diomedes Christodoulou](people/diomedes-christodoulou) (5), [Larry Izzo](people/larry-izzo) (3), [Sanjay Bhatnagar](people/sanjay-bhatnagar) (3), [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (3), [Rebecca Mcdonald](people/rebecca-mcdonald) (3).
